titleEn: MBRF reaches full cattle traceability across Brazil
titleZh: MBRF实现巴西全牛供应链可追溯，卫星监控覆盖2500万公顷
summaryZh: 巴西肉企MBRF宣布实现100%牛供应链可追溯，涵盖直接和间接供应商，通过24小时卫星地理监控系统覆盖约2500万公顷牧场，确保原料不来自毁林、奴役或童工等违规区域。该承诺原定于COP26提出，后提前至2025年完成，MBRF称此举为全球首创。
featuredReason: 该案例展示了卫星遥感与供应链追溯技术在畜牧业的深度应用，为智慧畜牧行业提供了大规模、全链条可追溯的实践范本，尤其对关注可持续养殖和合规管理的从业者具有重要参考价值。
contentFull: Markets Trade Traceability MBRF reaches full cattle traceability across Brazil System now covers direct and indirect suppliers 6 February 2026 1 minute read By: Global Ag Media South America Brazilian meat processor MBRF has fulfilled a public commitment to achieve 100% traceability of its cattle supply chain, including both direct and indirect farmers, across all Brazilian ecosystems from which it purchases animals, Reuters reported, citing the company on Thursday.With the milestone, MBRF said it had become a global pioneer by implementing a complete and verifiable monitoring system covering its entire supply chain for any potential social and environmental breaches.Cattle ranching is still widely viewed as a driver of deforestation in Brazil, which last year became the world's top producer of beef.According to specialists, Brazil still has large areas of degraded pastureland that, if better managed, could support more animals per hectare, increasing efficiency in the supply chain without additional deforestation.MBRF, one of Brazil's top three meat processors, said it currently monitors ranchers on about 25 million hectares (61.776 million acres) through a satellite-based geomonitoring system that operates 24 hours a day.The company said it has monitored its direct suppliers since 2010."With the expansion to full monitoring of indirect suppliers, MBRF now achieves complete supply-chain traceability, ensuring that the raw materials used in its production do not originate from areas with deforestation, conditions analogous to slavery or child labor, embargoed areas, conservation units or Indigenous lands..." the company said.MBRF's full traceability commitment was originally announced during the COP26 climate summit in Glasgow, with different deadlines by ecosystem: 2025 for the Amazon and 2030 for the Cerrado savannah. During COP28 in Dubai, MBRF voluntarily brought the target forward to 2025.In addition to cattle, MBRF said it already fully monitors its suppliers of grain, which is used as feed in animal production. Our Partners C-Lock dsm-firmenich Zoetis FAI Heifer International Hamlet Protein Global Ag Media More from this author More News View all Russian strikes cut Ukraine grain export capacity by a third Whole Hog: Market Trends Feed markets 17 July 2026 2 minute read Coca-Cola's fairlife suspends US dairy production after cyber attack Company News 17 July 2026 1 minute read Canadian facilities remain operational as investigation gets under way Soybean futures slip on milder weather outlook - CBOT Markets Market Trends Feed Markets 17 July 2026 1 minute read New-crop export sales top expectations despite pressure Our Partners C-Lock dsm-firmenich Zoetis FAI Heifer International Hamlet Protein
translationZh:
巴西肉类加工企业MBRF已履行公开承诺，实现了其牛供应链的100%可追溯性，涵盖直接和间接养殖户，覆盖其采购动物的所有巴西生态系统。据路透社周四援引该公司消息报道。

凭借这一里程碑，MBRF表示，它已成为全球先驱，实施了一个完整且可验证的监控系统，覆盖其整个供应链，以发现任何潜在的社会和环境违规行为。

养牛业仍被广泛视为巴西森林砍伐的驱动因素之一，巴西去年已成为全球最大的牛肉生产国。

据专家称，巴西仍有大面积退化的牧场，如果管理得当，每公顷可饲养更多动物，从而在不增加森林砍伐的情况下提高供应链效率。

作为巴西三大肉类加工企业之一，MBRF表示，目前通过一个24小时运行的卫星地理监控系统，监控约2500万公顷（6177.6万英亩）牧场上的牧场主。

该公司表示，自2010年以来，它一直在监控其直接供应商。

**随着监控范围扩大到间接供应商的全面监控，MBRF现在实现了完整的供应链可追溯性，确保其生产中使用的原材料不来自存在毁林、类似奴隶制或童工条件、禁运区域、保护区或土著土地的地区……**该公司表示。

MBRF的全面可追溯性承诺最初是在格拉斯哥COP26气候峰会上宣布的，并按生态系统设定了不同的截止日期：亚马逊地区为2025年，塞拉多稀树草原为2030年。在迪拜COP28期间，MBRF自愿将目标提前至2025年。

除了牛之外，MBRF表示，它已经全面监控其谷物供应商，这些谷物用于动物生产的饲料。
contentHtml:
MBRF reaches full cattle traceability across Brazil 
System now covers direct and indirect suppliers
